ogTitle: Pyap West vs Pygery: Climate Safety

heading: Pyap West vs Pygery — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pyap West, South Australia and Pygery, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pygery has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Pyap West (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pyap West or Pygery safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pyap West has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Pygery scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pyap West scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Pygery scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pyap West or Pygery?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pygery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
